title: A Favor from the Bank
content: You pick up the receiver and call an old friend who still works in the fraud department of Vane's bank.||'I'm looking at the records now,' he whispers, his voice crackling over the line. 'The Gazette only scratched the surface. Those "consulting fees"? They were wired directly from a Thorne & Co holding account every second Tuesday of the month.'||'It wasn't a one-time thing, Detective. Vane was receiving steady payments for over six months. It looks like he was either Thorne's silent partner... or his personal ghost.'
